steps.action: Initialize fresh project under mission evidence dir with `BROPILOT_API=false mix bro.init <path>`
steps.expected: Project initializes without touching shared API port
steps.observed: Init succeeded in isolated temp directory

steps.expected: File exists and has top-level `traceability` key

assertions.title: Link structure conforms to typed schema

steps.action: GET same entry and compare payload
steps.expected: Round-trip equality with no field loss
steps.observed: Observed links exactly match submitted payload (`round_trip_equal: true`)

assertions.title: Traceability data persists across server restarts

steps.action: Start isolated API instance on port 4001
steps.expected: Temporary test server available without taking down primary 4000 service

steps.action: Restart isolated 4001 API and GET entry again

evidence.network: PUT/GET on http://localhost:4001 plus before/after comparison

assertions.title: Step 8 codegen records implementation links

steps.expected: Codegen writes artifacts and auto-records implementation links
steps.observed: Build returned ok with tasks_completed=3 but files_written=[]

steps.action: Diff pre/post matrices and inspect generated output dir
steps.expected: New implementation links to generated files
steps.observed: Pre/post diff added 0 links; repository `output/` directory absent

assertions.issues: Build did not produce new traceability links for generated artifacts in this run.

assertions.title: Auto-linked file_path values point to existing files

steps.action: Enumerate all traceability link file paths from final matrix
steps.expected: Every file_path resolves under project root
steps.observed: 31 file paths were missing on disk

assertions.issues: Traceability matrix contains many non-existent file paths.

assertions.title: API spec links point to route handler functions

steps.action: Inspect all `api` category links from matrix
steps.expected: Links point to router/controller files and function names match definitions when provided
steps.observed: API links were not router/controller paths and linked files were missing, so function checks could not be satisfied

assertions.issues: API traceability links did not map to existing route handler files/functions.

assertions.title: Entity spec links include type, migration, and implementation

steps.expected: At least one entities entry includes `type`, `migration`, and `implementation`
steps.observed: Entities entries contained implementation/test only; no entity entry had all required link types

assertions.issues: Required entity link-type coverage (type+migration+implementation) was missing.

assertions.title: Behaviour spec links include test links

steps.expected: At least one behaviour entry has both `implementation` and `test` links
steps.observed: Behaviour entries had implementation links only; no test links present

assertions.issues: No behaviour traceability entry contained test-type links.

assertions.title: Component and view specs link to correct file types

steps.expected: Components link to component-source file types; views link to page/view files
steps.observed: Components included non-component `.ex`/missing links; only one view link pointed to an existing `.astro` page

assertions.issues: Component/view link typing was inconsistent and included missing/non-matching files.

assertions.title: Re-running codegen updates stale links

steps.action: Run POST `/api/build` again and re-read entry
steps.observed: Stale link remained unchanged before/after rerun

evidence.network: PUT stale entry -> 200; POST /api/build -> 200; GET before/after -> 200

assertions.issues: Codegen rerun did not update or mark stale traceability link in tested spec entry.

assertions.title: Codegen for all 11 spec categories produces links

steps.action: Run POST `/api/build` and compare matrix before/after
steps.expected: Build generates links across all 11 categories for this run
steps.observed: Coverage remained populated from existing entries, but build added 0 new links (no category-level new linkage)

assertions.issues: This build run did not produce new traceability links across categories (0 new links added).

assertions.title: Traceability links match actual generated files

steps.action: Iterate all file_path values from `GET /api/traceability` and check `test -f` under repo root
steps.observed: 31 linked file paths did not exist

assertions.issues: Traceability matrix includes many links to files absent from the project root.

frictions.description: Running `mix bro.init` without disabling API attempted to bind port 4000 and failed with `:eaddrinuse` against the already-running shared API.
frictions.resolution: Re-ran init command with `BROPILOT_API=false` for isolated filesystem validation.

frictions.description: Background server PID from fire-and-forget did not reliably map to the listener process when cleaning up port 4001.
frictions.resolution: Used `lsof -ti tcp:4001 | xargs kill` to cleanly stop temporary API listener and confirmed primary API on 4000 remained healthy.
